CAPA-2026-0341.Observation: The strongest verification evidence should connect engineering restoration with environmental performance.
CAPA-2026-0341.Recommendation: Use EM re-test results, airflow requalification, and batch exposure review as the verification package.
CAPA-2026-0341.Audit Rationale: This demonstrates both process recovery and documented product impact control.

CAPA-2026-0089.Observation: The finding is about documentation behavior, not only missing signatures.
CAPA-2026-0089.Recommendation: Verify corrected records and run a 30-day spot check for real-time completion and second-person verification.
CAPA-2026-0089.Audit Rationale: Sustained behavior evidence is more defensible than a one-time correction.

CAPA-2026-0112.Observation: Complaint verification should cover the returned sample, retained samples, and inspection trend.
CAPA-2026-0112.Recommendation: Use sample assessment, retained sample review, and visual inspection reconciliation trend as evidence.
CAPA-2026-0112.Audit Rationale: This links the customer-facing observation to manufacturing and inspection controls.
